pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 21 to align with the target JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 17 language features, preventing the use of Java 21-specific syntax and potentially causing runtime incompatibilities if Java 21 APIs are used.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Lombok dependency to a version compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of Lombok may not support Java 21 bytecode generation or annotation processing, leading to compilation errors or runtime failures.
